pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'kitchensink' to 'courses' to reflect the new application identity.
Update the project description to accurately describe the UCSB CMPSC 156 Courses Search App.
Add Maven properties for the new package structure and target classes.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data MongoDB dependency for database integration.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to replace Swagger/Springfox for API documentation in Spring Boot 3.
Remove deprecated springfox-boot-starter and springfox-swagger-ui dependencies incompatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency, likely to manage validation API versions during the Jakarta EE migration.
Add Awaitility library for testing asynchronous jobs.
Add spring-security-config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV processing capabilities.
Update JaCoCo coverage exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (courses instead of kitchensink).
Add a JaCoCo check execution with strict coverage rules (100% instruction, branch, line coverage).

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add configuration variable for MongoDB connection URI to support database connectivity.
Add configuration variables to define the start and end academic quarters for data scope.
Add configuration variable for UCSB API key to enable external data fetching.
Add configuration variable to define the threshold in minutes before course data is considered stale.
Add configuration variable for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.
Add frontend/strykerTmp to .gitignore to exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switched the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support the Java 21 migration.
Replaced apt-get commands with apk commands to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Upgraded the Node.js installation from version 12 to version 20.17.0 using nvm to meet modern frontend build requirements.
Explicitly installed Maven via apk since the new base image no longer bundles it, ensuring the build step can execute.
Added libstdc++ to the Alpine image to satisfy native library dependencies required by the Java application or its dependencies.
Installed git in the build image to support build-time operations that rely on git metadata or submodules.
Changed the copy strategy to include the entire git directory to support Dokku deployment requirements.
Added a PRODUCTION environment variable to configure the application behavior during the build and runtime.
Replaced the generic bash shell command with a specific entrypoint to run the packaged Java JAR file.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'demo-spring-react-kitchensink' to 'proj-courses' and update the description to reflect the CMPSC 156 legacy code project.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# proj-courses' and updated intro text to describe 'Courses Search'.

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku production and QA links for the current and previous semester teams.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with a table of Dokku URLs for prod/qa and W24 teams.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify the OAuth setup instructions by referencing a dedicated documentation file instead of inline steps.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced detailed Google Console steps with a link to `docs/oauth.md` and an error screenshot.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the local development setup instructions with code blocks and troubleshooting tips for frontend/backend synchronization.
README.md.human_impl: Added code blocks for `mvn` and `npm` commands and added notes about blank pages and frontend connection errors.

README.md.general_idea: Add specific instructions for deploying and configuring the application on Dokku, including environment variables.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Getting Started on Dokku' with `dokku config:set` commands and `PRODUCTION` variable notes.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the Swagger UI for API endpoints.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing swagger' with the localhost URL.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the H2 database console on localhost and Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing Database Console' with links to h2-console and Dokku postgres docs.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to run partial and full Pitest mutation coverage tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '## Partial pitest runs' with `mvn pitest:mutationCoverage` examples.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect a change in project identity or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Add 'react-app/jest' to the extends array to enable Jest-specific linting rules for test files.
Disable the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule to allow direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook log files to the frontend gitignore to prevent committing debug artifacts.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Switched Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern tooling standards.
Updated glob patterns for story files to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Added the official Storybook onboarding addon to provide guided setup experiences.
Added the Chromatic addon for visual regression testing integration.
Added the interactions addon to support user flow testing and interaction-based stories.
Added the remix-react-router addon to support routing in stories.
Added the queryparams addon to manage URL query parameters in stories.
Explicitly defined the framework configuration object for react-webpack5, replacing implicit detection.
Configured staticDirs to serve static assets from the public directory.
Removed the custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in the new setup.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Integrate msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: import { initialize, mswLoader } from 'msw-storybook-addon'; initialize(); loaders: [mswLoader]

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add react-toastify to provide visual feedback for navigation events in Storybook.
Implement a decorator that uses useLocation to toast a message when navigation occurs.
Allow stories to opt-out of the default MemoryRouter wrapper via a suppressMemoryRouter arg.
Update Storybook preview parameters to use the modern controls matchers syntax.
Refactor the preview configuration to use the standard default export object pattern.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const preview = { parameters: ..., loaders: ... }; export default preview;

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replace generic Create React App boilerplate documentation with project-specific commands and directory structure explanations.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# Getting Started with Create React App' and 'Available Scripts' with custom tables for 'Commands' and 'Directory structures'.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Remove outdated links to external Create React App documentation sections that are no longer relevant or maintained.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections linking to 'Code Splitting', 'Analyzing the Bundle Size', 'Making a Progressive Web App', 'Advanced Configuration', 'Deployment', and 'npm run build fails to minify'.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrated package-lock.json from lockfileVersion 1 to 3 to align with modern npm standards and Node.js 20 environment.
Renamed the frontend package identifier to match the project name convention.
Incremented the frontend package version to reflect the new release cycle.
Updated core React dependencies to version 18 to support modern React features and compatibility with newer tooling.
Upgraded Storybook to version 8 to utilize the latest UI development and documentation features.
Updated testing libraries to their latest major versions for better React 18 support and API improvements.
Upgraded UI framework dependencies to the latest stable versions.
Updated data fetching and state management libraries to their latest versions.
Upgraded routing library to React Router v6 for improved declarative routing.
Updated build tooling and linting dependencies to support modern JavaScript standards and Node 20.
Added or updated mutation testing tools to support the new test runner configuration.
Updated manual mocking and server-side rendering utilities for testing.
Updated form handling and UI component libraries.
Updated visualization and data display libraries.
Updated GraphQL client dependencies.
Updated table and inspector utilities.
Updated performance monitoring library.
Updated Jest core dependency to align with the new test runner.
Updated user event simulation library for testing.
Updated mock adapter for Axios testing.
Updated console mocking utility for tests.
Updated code coverage tool.
Updated global types and ESLint plugins.
Updated Storybook addons for interactions, links, and onboarding.
Updated Storybook blocks and preset for Create React App.
Updated Storybook test and webpack integration.
Updated Storybook query params and remix router addons.
Updated Chromatic integration for Storybook.
Updated TypeScript ESLint integration.
Updated Babel plugin for private property in object proposals.
Updated prop-types dependency.
Updated Storybook essentials addon.
Updated Storybook onboarding addon.
Updated ESLint plugin for Storybook.
Updated ESLint core configuration.
Pinned the Node.js engine version to 20.17.0 to ensure consistency with the migration target environment.
